metadata.title:
TEN SUITS FOR
FIRE LOSS !.


I'LL @OOO

pages.raw_text:
Ten damage suits against the
Northern Pacific, growing out of
the forest fire at Standpoint, Idaho,
August l last, were filed Saturday
afternoon in the superior court.
The plaintiffs allege that the rail-
roads servants and agents who
were clearing ground for the COM
pany's structures at Kootenai,
Idaho, caused fires to be started
which spread to the adjacent tim
Der and got beyond control, burn
Ing the property of the plaintiffs
and damaging them to the extent
claimed. The total damages asked
in the 10 suits is $45,775. The
Standpoint Lumber & Pole Co.
was the heaviest sufferer, claiming
loss Of $4,000. c. F. Ewing &
Co. are next, with a claim Of $11.-
